response.justification: Bogdan has extensive C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments) and strong software development skills across multiple languages and platforms. However, his domain expertise in capital markets/fixed income is unclear, and his recent roles primarily involve web/mobile development (Node.js, TypeScript) rather than C++ on Windows for financial systems. The resume lacks evidence of SQL Server/Oracle experience or fixed-income domain knowledge.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments, embedded systems)
Proven software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Diverse technical background with high-performance and low-latency systems
concerns: Limited recent C++ work on Windows (roles focus on Node.js/TypeScript)
No clear domain expertise in capital markets/fixed income or investment banking
Lack of SQL Server/Oracle experience (mentions MySQL/SQL generally)
